Author: anfroholic
Content:
Hey all, 
I've got a number of components on order so we'll see how things go when I get them. 
A few small changes, I think the chandelier will be direct driven, I have a motor on the way. 

I made the first rev chandelier carousel thing. There's quite a lot of things I don't like, but overall I'm liking the direction. 
I have made some changes to the feeders as there wasn't room for the toolhead with the cover tape where it was, so moved it back futher. 
Probably a lot more, but that's what I have in my mind at the moment.
